rationale: The skill instructs running `npx -y firebase-tools@latest emulators:start`, which spawns npx/node and fetches the firebase-tools package from npm registry, then invokes the firebase CLI. Per the skill's own observed-runtime notes, firebase-tools queries firebase-public.firebaseio.com on every invocation and downloads emulator JARs from github.com/release-assets.githubusercontent.com, while maintaining XDG configstore state under ~/.config/configstore/. Deploys would also touch Firebase/Google API hosts and read/write firebase.json and .firebaserc in the project. No deletions are implied by the documented verbs.
